{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_0513a431322c489782b0dd45","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t---\n2\tname: adc-1dj-flag-check-test-cases\n3\tdescription: Flag check test case documentation for IntentRouter confidence threshold logic\n4\tmetadata:\n5\t  type: project\n6\t  bead_id: adc-1dj\n7\t  created: 2026-06-07\n8\t---\n9\t\n10\t# Flag Check Test Cases\n11\t\n12\t## Overview\n13\t\n14\tThe \"flag check\" functionality is implemented in `src/intent/router.py` within the `IntentRouter` class. It uses confidence scores from LLM-based intent classification to determine routing behavior:\n15\t\n16\t- **confidence >= 0.9**: Dispatch immediately (high confidence)\n17\t- **confidence 0.7-0.9**: Dispatch but flag for possible clarification (medium confidence)\n18\t- **confidence < 0.7**: Return `intent_type=\"clarification\"` requiring user input (low confidence)\n19\t\n20\t## Components Under Test\n21\t\n22\t1. **IntentType Enum** (`src/intent/router.py:26-36`)\n23\t   - Contains `CLARIFICATION` type for low-confidence intents\n24\t\n25\t2. **IntentClassification** (`src/intent/router.py:40-47`)\n26\t   - Contains `confidence: float` field (default 1.0)\n27\t\n28\t3. **IntentRouter.classify_utterance()** (`src/intent/router.py:164-252`)\n29\t   - Parses LLM JSON response\n30\t   - Handles unknown intent types (defaults to STATUS)\n31\t   - Handles JSON decode errors (fallback to STATUS with 0.5 confidence)\n32\t\n33\t4. **IntentRouter.route_utterance()** (`src/intent/router.py:254-289`)\n34\t   - Calls classify_utterance\n35\t   - Creates RoutedIntent objects\n36\t\n37\t5. **IntentRouter.process_intent()** (`src/intent/router.py:291-311`)\n38\t   - Routes task-profile to escalate strand\n39\t   - Routes others to fetch + synthesize strands\n40\t\n41\t## Test Scenarios\n42\t\n43\t### Happy Path (High Confidence Dispatch)\n44\t\n45\t#### TC-FC-001: High Confidence (>0.9) Dispatch\n46\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.95 should dispatch immediately\n47\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.95, \"project_slug\": \"options-pipeline\", ...}`\n48\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = STATUS\n49\t- **Assert**: No clarification flag, proceed to fetch/synthesize\n50\t\n51\t#### TC-FC-002: Maximum Confidence (1.0) Dispatch\n52\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 1.0 should dispatch immediately\n53\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"action\", \"confidence\": 1.0, ...}`\n54\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = ACTION\n55\t- **Assert**: No clarification flag, proceed to fetch/synthesize\n56\t\n57\t#### TC-FC-003: Boundary High (0.9) Dispatch\n58\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence exactly 0.9 should dispatch immediately\n59\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"lookup\", \"confidence\": 0.9, ...}`\n60\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = LOOKUP\n61\t- **Assert**: No clarification flag, proceed to fetch/synthesize\n62\t\n63\t### Flag for Possible Clarification (Medium Confidence)\n64\t\n65\t#### TC-FC-004: Medium Confidence (0.8) Flag\n66\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.8 should dispatch but be flagged for clarification\n67\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.8, \"project_slug\": null, ...}`\n68\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = STATUS, confidence = 0.8\n69\t- **Assert**: Intent dispatched but marked for possible clarification\n70\t- **Note**: The actual flagging mechanism needs implementation (currently documented but not enforced in code)\n71\t\n72\t#### TC-FC-005: Medium Confidence (0.75) Flag\n73\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.75 should dispatch but be flagged\n74\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"brainstorm\", \"confidence\": 0.75, ...}`\n75\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created, confidence = 0.75\n76\t- **Assert**: Dispatch with flag for clarification\n77\t\n78\t#### TC-FC-006: Boundary Medium (0.7) Flag\n79\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence exactly 0.7 should dispatch but be flagged\n80\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"action\", \"confidence\": 0.7, ...}`\n81\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created, confidence = 0.7\n82\t- **Assert**: Dispatch with flag for clarification\n83\t\n84\t### Explicit Clarification Request (Low Confidence)\n85\t\n86\t#### TC-FC-007: Low Confidence (0.6) Clarification\n87\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.6 should return clarification type\n88\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.6, \"utterance_fragment\": \"check the pods\", ...}`\n89\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent with classification.intent_type = CLARIFICATION\n90\t- **Assert**: Intent marked as requiring user clarification\n91\t\n92\t#### TC-FC-008: Very Low Confidence (0.3) Clarification\n93\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.3 should require clarification\n94\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.3, ...}`\n95\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent with classification.intent_type = CLARIFICATION\n96\t- **Assert**: Intent marked as requiring user clarification\n97\t\n98\t#### TC-FC-009: Zero Confidence Clarification\n99\t- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.0 should require clarification\n100\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.0, ...}`\n101\t- **Expected**: RoutedIntent with classification.intent_type = CLARIFICATION\n102\t- **Assert**: Intent marked as requiring user clarification\n103\t\n104\t### Edge Cases\n105\t\n106\t#### TC-FC-010: Missing Confidence Field\n107\t- **Description**: JSON response missing confidence field should use default 0.8\n108\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"project_slug\": \"test\", ...}` (no confidence key)\n109\t- **Expected**: Classification created with default confidence = 0.8\n110\t- **Assert**: `classification.confidence == 0.8`\n111\t\n112\t#### TC-FC-011: Invalid Confidence String\n113\t- **Description**: Confidence as string \"high\" should be converted to float or fail\n114\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": \"high\", ...}`\n115\t- **Expected**: ValueError or successful conversion to float\n116\t- **Assert**: Appropriate error handling or conversion\n117\t\n118\t#### TC-FC-012: Negative Confidence\n119\t- **Description**: Negative confidence value should be handled\n120\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": -0.5, ...}`\n121\t- **Expected**: ValueError or clamping to valid range\n122\t- **Assert**: Appropriate error handling or normalization\n123\t\n124\t#### TC-FC-013: Over-Unity Confidence (>1.0)\n125\t- **Description**: Confidence > 1.0 should be handled\n126\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 1.5, ...}`\n127\t- **Expected**: ValueError or clamping to 1.0\n128\t- **Assert**: Appropriate error handling or normalization\n129\t\n130\t#### TC-FC-014: Unknown Intent Type\n131\t- **Description**: Invalid intent_type should default to STATUS\n132\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"invalid-type\", \"confidence\": 0.9, ...}`\n133\t- **Expected**: Classification with intent_type = STATUS (default fallback)\n134\t- **Assert**: classification.intent_type == IntentType.STATUS\n135\t- **Note**: Currently logged as warning and defaults to STATUS\n136\t\n137\t#### TC-FC-015: Empty Intent Array\n138\t- **Description**: Empty JSON array from LLM should be handled\n139\t- **Input**: `[]`\n140\t- **Expected**: Empty list of classifications\n141\t- **Assert**: `classifications == []`\n142\t\n143\t#### TC-FC-016: Multiple Intents with Mixed Confidence\n144\t- **Description**: Multiple intents with varying confidence levels\n145\t- **Input**: `[\n146\t  {\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.95},\n147\t  {\"intent_type\": \"action\", \"confidence\": 0.75},\n148\t  {\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.5}\n149\t]`\n150\t- **Expected**: 3 RoutedIntents with appropriate routing per confidence level\n151\t- **Assert**: First dispatches, second flagged, third requires clarification\n152\t\n153\t### Error Conditions\n154\t\n155\t#### TC-FC-017: Malformed JSON Response\n156\t- **Description**: Non-JSON response from LLM should trigger fallback\n157\t- **Input**: `\"This is not JSON\"`\n158\t- **Expected**: Fallback classification with intent_type = STATUS, confidence = 0.5\n159\t- **Assert**: Fallback classification created, error logged\n160\t\n161\t#### TC-FC-018: JSON Decode Error\n162\t- **Description**: Invalid JSON structure should trigger fallback\n163\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": }` (incomplete JSON)\n164\t- **Expected**: Fallback classification with intent_type = STATUS, confidence = 0.5\n165\t- **Assert**: Fallback classification created, error logged\n166\t\n167\t#### TC-FC-019: LLM Timeout/Failure\n168\t- **Description**: LLM call timeout should raise or handle gracefully\n169\t- **Input**: Timeout exception from LLM client\n170\t- **Expected**: Exception propagated or fallback classification\n171\t- **Assert**: Error logged, appropriate error handling\n172\t\n173\t#### TC-FC-020: Missing Utterance Fragment\n174\t- **Description**: Intent without utterance_fragment should use original utterance\n175\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.9}` (no utterance_fragment)\n176\t- **Expected**: classification.utterance_fragment == original utterance\n177\t- **Assert**: Utterance fragment defaults to full utterance\n178\t\n179\t### Task-Profile Routing with Confidence\n180\t\n181\t#### TC-FC-021: Task-Profile with High Confidence\n182\t- **Description**: Task-profile intent with high confidence should escalate to bead\n183\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"task-profile\", \"confidence\": 0.95, ...}`\n184\t- **Expected**: Intent escalated to NEEDLE bead\n185\t- **Assert**: Escalate handler called, bead created\n186\t\n187\t#### TC-FC-022: Task-Profile with Low Confidence\n188\t- **Description**: Task-profile intent with low confidence should still escalate\n189\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"task-profile\", \"confidence\": 0.5, ...}`\n190\t- **Expected**: Intent escalated to NEEDLE bead (task-profiles always escalate)\n191\t- **Assert**: Escalate handler called despite low confidence\n192\t\n193\t### Session Context Integration\n194\t\n195\t#### TC-FC-023: Session Context Boosts Confidence\n196\t- **Description**: Relevant recent intents should boost confidence\n197\t- **Input**: Utterance \"how are they?\" after recent intent about \"pods in options-pipeline\"\n198\t- **Expected**: Classification with higher confidence due to context\n199\t- **Assert**: confidence > baseline without context\n200\t\n201\t#### TC-FC-024: No Session Context (New Session)\n202\t- **Description**: New session with no context should handle appropriately\n203\t- **Input**: Utterance with no prior intents in session\n204\t- **Expected**: Classification based solely on utterance content\n205\t- **Assert**: No errors, baseline confidence\n206\t\n207\t### Urgency Tier Integration\n208\t\n209\t#### TC-FC-025: Low Confidence with Critical Urgency\n210\t- **Description**: Low confidence intent marked as critical should handle specially\n211\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.5, \"urgency\": \"critical\"}`\n212\t- **Expected**: Intent marked for clarification but urgency preserved\n213\t- **Assert**: classification.urgency == \"critical\"\n214\t\n215\t#### TC-FC-026: Missing Urgency Defaults to Normal\n216\t- **Description**: Intent without urgency should default to \"normal\"\n217\t- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.9}` (no urgency)\n218\t- **Expected**: classification.urgency == \"normal\"\n219\t- **Assert**: Default urgency applied\n220\t\n221\t### Boundary Values (Comprehensive)\n222\t\n223\t#### TC-FC-027: Float Precision at Boundaries\n224\t- **Description**: Test boundary values with float precision\n225\t- **Inputs**: confidence = 0.899999, 0.900001, 0.699999, 0.700001\n226\t- **Expected**: Correct classification based on threshold logic\n227\t- **Assert**: 0.899999 should flag, 0.900001 should dispatch, 0.699999 should clarify, 0.700001 should flag\n228\t\n229\t## Implementation Gaps Identified\n230\t\n231\t1. **No Explicit Flag Field**: The codebase documents the \"flag for possible clarification\" behavior but does not implement a dedicated `flagged: bool` field on `IntentClassification` or `RoutedIntent`. The flagging behavior appears to be implicit based on confidence value alone.\n232\t\n233\t2. **No Clarification Handler**: While `IntentType.CLARIFICATION` is defined, there is no explicit handler for clarification intents in the router. The code routes to `_fetch_and_synthesize` for non-task-profile intents.\n234\t\n235\t3. **No UI Feedback for Flagged Intents**: The system does not currently surface the \"flagged\" state to the user surface.\n236\t\n237\t## Recommendations\n238\t\n239\t1. Add explicit `flagged: bool` field to `IntentClassification`\n240\t2. Implement clarification intent handler or explicit rejection\n241\t3. Add UI indication for flagged intents (e.g., subtle badge showing \"low confidence\")\n242\t4. Consider confidence calibration via feedback loop\n243\t5. Add metrics tracking for confidence distribution\n244\t\n245\t## Test Priority\n246\t\n247\t| Priority | Test Cases |\n248\t|----------|------------|\n249\t| P0 (Critical) | TC-FC-001, TC-FC-004, TC-FC-007, TC-FC-017, TC-FC-018 |\n250\t| P1 (High) | TC-FC-002, TC-FC-003, TC-FC-005, TC-FC-006, TC-FC-008, TC-FC-010, TC-FC-014 |\n251\t| P2 (Medium) | TC-FC-009, TC-FC-011, TC-FC-012, TC-FC-013, TC-FC-015, TC-FC-016, TC-FC-021 |\n252\t| P3 (Low) | TC-FC-019, TC-FC-020, TC-FC-022, TC-FC-023, TC-FC-024, TC-FC-025, TC-FC-026, TC-FC-027 |\n253\t\n254\t## Files to Create\n255\t\n256\t1. `test/test_flag_check.py` - Unit tests for confidence threshold logic\n257\t2. `test/integration/test_flag_check_integration.py` - Integration tests with mock LLM\n258\t3. `test/fixtures/flag_check_fixtures.py` - Shared test data and fixtures\n259\t\n260\t## References\n261\t\n262\t- Implementation: `src/intent/router.py`\n263\t- Intent types: `src/intent/router.py:26-36`\n264\t- Classification logic: `src/intent/router.py:164-252`\n265\t- Routing logic: `src/intent/router.py:254-311`\n266\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"17ffbe55-1eab-4c9b-83f2-3f3986754604","uuid":"994c4840-37e3-47be-8646-efeee6f77a31","timestamp":"2026-06-07T16:44:48.701Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/notes/adc-1dj-flag-check-test-cases.md","content":"---\nname: adc-1dj-flag-check-test-cases\ndescription: Flag check test case documentation for IntentRouter confidence threshold logic\nmetadata:\n  type: project\n  bead_id: adc-1dj\n  created: 2026-06-07\n---\n\n# Flag Check Test Cases\n\n## Overview\n\nThe \"flag check\" functionality is implemented in `src/intent/router.py` within the `IntentRouter` class. It uses confidence scores from LLM-based intent classification to determine routing behavior:\n\n- **confidence >= 0.9**: Dispatch immediately (high confidence)\n- **confidence 0.7-0.9**: Dispatch but flag for possible clarification (medium confidence)\n- **confidence < 0.7**: Return `intent_type=\"clarification\"` requiring user input (low confidence)\n\n## Components Under Test\n\n1. **IntentType Enum** (`src/intent/router.py:26-36`)\n   - Contains `CLARIFICATION` type for low-confidence intents\n\n2. **IntentClassification** (`src/intent/router.py:40-47`)\n   - Contains `confidence: float` field (default 1.0)\n\n3. **IntentRouter.classify_utterance()** (`src/intent/router.py:164-252`)\n   - Parses LLM JSON response\n   - Handles unknown intent types (defaults to STATUS)\n   - Handles JSON decode errors (fallback to STATUS with 0.5 confidence)\n\n4. **IntentRouter.route_utterance()** (`src/intent/router.py:254-289`)\n   - Calls classify_utterance\n   - Creates RoutedIntent objects\n\n5. **IntentRouter.process_intent()** (`src/intent/router.py:291-311`)\n   - Routes task-profile to escalate strand\n   - Routes others to fetch + synthesize strands\n\n## Test Scenarios\n\n### Happy Path (High Confidence Dispatch)\n\n#### TC-FC-001: High Confidence (>0.9) Dispatch\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.95 should dispatch immediately\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.95, \"project_slug\": \"options-pipeline\", ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = STATUS\n- **Assert**: No clarification flag, proceed to fetch/synthesize\n\n#### TC-FC-002: Maximum Confidence (1.0) Dispatch\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 1.0 should dispatch immediately\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"action\", \"confidence\": 1.0, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = ACTION\n- **Assert**: No clarification flag, proceed to fetch/synthesize\n\n#### TC-FC-003: Boundary High (0.9) Dispatch\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence exactly 0.9 should dispatch immediately\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"lookup\", \"confidence\": 0.9, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = LOOKUP\n- **Assert**: No clarification flag, proceed to fetch/synthesize\n\n### Flag for Possible Clarification (Medium Confidence)\n\n#### TC-FC-004: Medium Confidence (0.8) Flag\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.8 should dispatch but be flagged for clarification\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.8, \"project_slug\": null, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created with classification.intent_type = STATUS, confidence = 0.8\n- **Assert**: Intent dispatched but marked for possible clarification\n- **Note**: The actual flagging mechanism needs implementation (currently documented but not enforced in code)\n\n#### TC-FC-005: Medium Confidence (0.75) Flag\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.75 should dispatch but be flagged\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"brainstorm\", \"confidence\": 0.75, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created, confidence = 0.75\n- **Assert**: Dispatch with flag for clarification\n\n#### TC-FC-006: Boundary Medium (0.7) Flag\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence exactly 0.7 should dispatch but be flagged\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"action\", \"confidence\": 0.7, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent created, confidence = 0.7\n- **Assert**: Dispatch with flag for clarification\n\n### Explicit Clarification Request (Low Confidence)\n\n#### TC-FC-007: Low Confidence (0.6) Clarification\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.6 should return clarification type\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.6, \"utterance_fragment\": \"check the pods\", ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent with classification.intent_type = CLARIFICATION\n- **Assert**: Intent marked as requiring user clarification\n\n#### TC-FC-008: Very Low Confidence (0.3) Clarification\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.3 should require clarification\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.3, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent with classification.intent_type = CLARIFICATION\n- **Assert**: Intent marked as requiring user clarification\n\n#### TC-FC-009: Zero Confidence Clarification\n- **Description**: Intent with confidence 0.0 should require clarification\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.0, ...}`\n- **Expected**: RoutedIntent with classification.intent_type = CLARIFICATION\n- **Assert**: Intent marked as requiring user clarification\n\n### Edge Cases\n\n#### TC-FC-010: Missing Confidence Field\n- **Description**: JSON response missing confidence field should use default 0.8\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"project_slug\": \"test\", ...}` (no confidence key)\n- **Expected**: Classification created with default confidence = 0.8\n- **Assert**: `classification.confidence == 0.8`\n\n#### TC-FC-011: Invalid Confidence String\n- **Description**: Confidence as string \"high\" should be converted to float or fail\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": \"high\", ...}`\n- **Expected**: ValueError or successful conversion to float\n- **Assert**: Appropriate error handling or conversion\n\n#### TC-FC-012: Negative Confidence\n- **Description**: Negative confidence value should be handled\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": -0.5, ...}`\n- **Expected**: ValueError or clamping to valid range\n- **Assert**: Appropriate error handling or normalization\n\n#### TC-FC-013: Over-Unity Confidence (>1.0)\n- **Description**: Confidence > 1.0 should be handled\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 1.5, ...}`\n- **Expected**: ValueError or clamping to 1.0\n- **Assert**: Appropriate error handling or normalization\n\n#### TC-FC-014: Unknown Intent Type\n- **Description**: Invalid intent_type should default to STATUS\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"invalid-type\", \"confidence\": 0.9, ...}`\n- **Expected**: Classification with intent_type = STATUS (default fallback)\n- **Assert**: classification.intent_type == IntentType.STATUS\n- **Note**: Currently logged as warning and defaults to STATUS\n\n#### TC-FC-015: Empty Intent Array\n- **Description**: Empty JSON array from LLM should be handled\n- **Input**: `[]`\n- **Expected**: Empty list of classifications\n- **Assert**: `classifications == []`\n\n#### TC-FC-016: Multiple Intents with Mixed Confidence\n- **Description**: Multiple intents with varying confidence levels\n- **Input**: `[\n  {\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.95},\n  {\"intent_type\": \"action\", \"confidence\": 0.75},\n  {\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.5}\n]`\n- **Expected**: 3 RoutedIntents with appropriate routing per confidence level\n- **Assert**: First dispatches, second flagged, third requires clarification\n\n### Error Conditions\n\n#### TC-FC-017: Malformed JSON Response\n- **Description**: Non-JSON response from LLM should trigger fallback\n- **Input**: `\"This is not JSON\"`\n- **Expected**: Fallback classification with intent_type = STATUS, confidence = 0.5\n- **Assert**: Fallback classification created, error logged\n\n#### TC-FC-018: JSON Decode Error\n- **Description**: Invalid JSON structure should trigger fallback\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": }` (incomplete JSON)\n- **Expected**: Fallback classification with intent_type = STATUS, confidence = 0.5\n- **Assert**: Fallback classification created, error logged\n\n#### TC-FC-019: LLM Timeout/Failure\n- **Description**: LLM call timeout should raise or handle gracefully\n- **Input**: Timeout exception from LLM client\n- **Expected**: Exception propagated or fallback classification\n- **Assert**: Error logged, appropriate error handling\n\n#### TC-FC-020: Missing Utterance Fragment\n- **Description**: Intent without utterance_fragment should use original utterance\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.9}` (no utterance_fragment)\n- **Expected**: classification.utterance_fragment == original utterance\n- **Assert**: Utterance fragment defaults to full utterance\n\n### Task-Profile Routing with Confidence\n\n#### TC-FC-021: Task-Profile with High Confidence\n- **Description**: Task-profile intent with high confidence should escalate to bead\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"task-profile\", \"confidence\": 0.95, ...}`\n- **Expected**: Intent escalated to NEEDLE bead\n- **Assert**: Escalate handler called, bead created\n\n#### TC-FC-022: Task-Profile with Low Confidence\n- **Description**: Task-profile intent with low confidence should still escalate\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"task-profile\", \"confidence\": 0.5, ...}`\n- **Expected**: Intent escalated to NEEDLE bead (task-profiles always escalate)\n- **Assert**: Escalate handler called despite low confidence\n\n### Session Context Integration\n\n#### TC-FC-023: Session Context Boosts Confidence\n- **Description**: Relevant recent intents should boost confidence\n- **Input**: Utterance \"how are they?\" after recent intent about \"pods in options-pipeline\"\n- **Expected**: Classification with higher confidence due to context\n- **Assert**: confidence > baseline without context\n\n#### TC-FC-024: No Session Context (New Session)\n- **Description**: New session with no context should handle appropriately\n- **Input**: Utterance with no prior intents in session\n- **Expected**: Classification based solely on utterance content\n- **Assert**: No errors, baseline confidence\n\n### Urgency Tier Integration\n\n#### TC-FC-025: Low Confidence with Critical Urgency\n- **Description**: Low confidence intent marked as critical should handle specially\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"clarification\", \"confidence\": 0.5, \"urgency\": \"critical\"}`\n- **Expected**: Intent marked for clarification but urgency preserved\n- **Assert**: classification.urgency == \"critical\"\n\n#### TC-FC-026: Missing Urgency Defaults to Normal\n- **Description**: Intent without urgency should default to \"normal\"\n- **Input**: `{\"intent_type\": \"status\", \"confidence\": 0.9}` (no urgency)\n- **Expected**: classification.urgency == \"normal\"\n- **Assert**: Default urgency applied\n\n### Boundary Values (Comprehensive)\n\n#### TC-FC-027: Float Precision at Boundaries\n- **Description**: Test boundary values with float precision\n- **Inputs**: confidence = 0.899999, 0.900001, 0.699999, 0.700001\n- **Expected**: Correct classification based on threshold logic\n- **Assert**: 0.899999 should flag, 0.900001 should dispatch, 0.699999 should clarify, 0.700001 should flag\n\n## Implementation Gaps Identified\n\n1. **No Explicit Flag Field**: The codebase documents the \"flag for possible clarification\" behavior but does not implement a dedicated `flagged: bool` field on `IntentClassification` or `RoutedIntent`. The flagging behavior appears to be implicit based on confidence value alone.\n\n2. **No Clarification Handler**: While `IntentType.CLARIFICATION` is defined, there is no explicit handler for clarification intents in the router. The code routes to `_fetch_and_synthesize` for non-task-profile intents.\n\n3. **No UI Feedback for Flagged Intents**: The system does not currently surface the \"flagged\" state to the user surface.\n\n## Recommendations\n\n1. Add explicit `flagged: bool` field to `IntentClassification`\n2. Implement clarification intent handler or explicit rejection\n3. Add UI indication for flagged intents (e.g., subtle badge showing \"low confidence\")\n4. Consider confidence calibration via feedback loop\n5. Add metrics tracking for confidence distribution\n\n## Test Priority\n\n| Priority | Test Cases |\n|----------|------------|\n| P0 (Critical) | TC-FC-001, TC-FC-004, TC-FC-007, TC-FC-017, TC-FC-018 |\n| P1 (High) | TC-FC-002, TC-FC-003, TC-FC-005, TC-FC-006, TC-FC-008, TC-FC-010, TC-FC-014 |\n| P2 (Medium) | TC-FC-009, TC-FC-011, TC-FC-012, TC-FC-013, TC-FC-015, TC-FC-016, TC-FC-021 |\n| P3 (Low) | TC-FC-019, TC-FC-020, TC-FC-022, TC-FC-023, TC-FC-024, TC-FC-025, TC-FC-026, TC-FC-027 |\n\n## Files to Create\n\n1. `test/test_flag_check.py` - Unit tests for confidence threshold logic\n2. `test/integration/test_flag_check_integration.py` - Integration tests with mock LLM\n3. `test/fixtures/flag_check_fixtures.py` - Shared test data and fixtures\n\n## References\n\n- Implementation: `src/intent/router.py`\n- Intent types: `src/intent/router.py:26-36`\n- Classification logic: `src/intent/router.py:164-252`\n- Routing logic: `src/intent/router.py:254-311`\n","numLines":266,"startLine":1,"totalLines":266}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_3925425a649b4de8bb5f6165","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t\"\"\"\n2\tIntent Router - classifies utterances and routes to appropriate strands.\n3\t\n4\tUses LLM to classify intents by type and project, then routes:\n5\t- task-profile intents → escalate strand (bead creation)\n6\t- other intents → fetch + synthesize strands\n7\t\"\"\"\n8\timport asyncio\n9\timport uuid\n10\tfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n11\tfrom enum import Enum\n12\tfrom logging import getLogger\n13\tfrom typing import Any, Optional\n14\t\n15\tfrom ..escalate.handler import EscalateRequest, escalate_intent\n16\tfrom ..escalate.llm import get_zai_client, ModelClass\n17\tfrom ..session.store import get_store\n18\tfrom ..fetch.commands import FetchRequest, FetchContext, IntentType as FetchIntentType\n19\tfrom ..fetch.orchestrator import execute_fetch\n20\tfrom ..synthesize.strand import SynthesizeRequest, synthesize_intent\n21\t\n22\t\n23\tlogger = getLogger(__name__)\n24\t\n25\t\n26\tclass IntentType(Enum):\n27\t    \"\"\"Intent types that the router can classify.\"\"\"\n28\t    STATUS = \"status\"\n29\t    ACTION = \"action\"\n30\t    BRAINSTORM = \"brainstorm\"\n31\t    LOOKUP = \"lookup\"\n32\t    REMINDER = \"reminder\"\n33\t    SELF_MODIFICATION = \"self-modification\"\n34\t    MONITORING_CONFIG = \"monitoring-config\"\n35\t    TASK_PROFILE = \"task-profile\"  # Escalate to NEEDLE bead\n36\t    CLARIFICATION = \"clarification\"  # Needs user input\n37\t\n38\t\n39\t@dataclass\n40\tclass IntentClassification:\n41\t    \"\"\"Result of intent classification.\"\"\"\n42\t    intent_type: IntentType\n43\t    project_slug: str | None = None\n44\t    confidence: float = 1.0\n45\t    utterance_fragment: str = \"\"\n46\t    reasoning: str = \"\"\n47\t    urgency: str = \"normal\"  # critical, high, normal, low\n48\t\n49\t\n50\t@dataclass\n51\tclass RoutedIntent:\n52\t    \"\"\"A routed intent ready for processing.\"\"\"\n53\t    intent_id: str\n54\t    classification: IntentClassification\n55\t    session_id: str\n56\t    utterance: str\n57\t\n58\t\n59\t# Router system prompt\n60\tROUTER_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \"\"\"You are the Intent Router for aide-de-camp, a universal personal interface that routes user utterances to parallel agents across multiple projects and domains.\n61\t\n62\t## Your Role\n63\t\n64\tGiven a user utterance (stream-of-consciousness voice or text), you must:\n65\t1. **Segment** the utterance into distinct intent threads\n66\t2. **Classify** each thread by intent type\n67\t3. **Route** each thread to the correct project\n68\t4. **Assign** urgency tier\n69\t\n70\t## Output Format\n71\t\n72\tReturn a JSON array of intent objects:\n73\t\n74\t```json\n75\t[\n76\t  {\n77\t    \"intent_type\": \"status|action|brainstorm|lookup|reminder|self-modification|monitoring-config|task-profile\",\n78\t    \"project_slug\": \"project-id or null\",\n79\t    \"urgency\": \"critical|high|normal|low\",\n80\t    \"utterance_fragment\": \"the specific fragment this intent covers\",\n81\t    \"confidence\": 0.0-1.0,\n82\t    \"reasoning\": \"brief explanation of classification\"\n83\t  }\n84\t]\n85\t```\n86\t\n87\t## Intent Types\n88\t\n89\t- **status**: Query current state (pods, pipelines, deployments, beads)\n90\t- **action**: Execute a command (deploy, restart, create)\n91\t- **brainstorm**: Explore options, design, architecture discussion\n92\t- **lookup**: Find specific information (logs, configs, docs)\n93\t- **reminder**: Set or query reminders\n94\t- **self-modification**: Instructions to improve the interface itself\n95\t- **monitoring-config**: Configure ambient monitoring rules\n96\t- **task-profile**: Durable async work items that escalate to NEEDLE beads\n97\t\n98\t## Task-Profile Classification\n99\t\n100\tRoute to **task-profile** when:\n101\t- User explicitly requests tracking (\"make me a bead for...\", \"track this as...\")\n102\t- Intent requires multi-step implementation work\n103\t- Request involves creating/modifying features or infrastructure\n104\t- Complexity exceeds single-turn synthesis\n105\t- Action verbs: \"implement\", \"add\", \"create\", \"fix\", \"investigate\", \"refactor\"\n106\t- Scope indicators: \"feature\", \"bug\", \"optimization\", \"migration\"\n107\t\n108\tTask-profile intents are escalated to NEEDLE beads for durable async handling.\n109\t\n110\t## Urgency Tiers\n111\t\n112\t- **critical**: Blocking production, security incident, immediate action required\n113\t- **high**: Important but not blocking, user is actively waiting\n114\t- **normal**: Routine query, no time pressure\n115\t- **low**: Background research, nice-to-have, can be deferred\n116\t\n117\t## Routing Logic\n118\t\n119\tUse available project context to map utterances to projects:\n120\t- Look for direct project name matches\n121\t- Check aliases (e.g., \"the pipeline\" → \"options-pipeline\")\n122\t- Use context from previous utterances in the session\n123\t- If ambiguous, set confidence < 0.7 and the system will clarify\n124\t\n125\t## Segmentation Guidelines\n126\t\n127\t- Split multi-part utterances: \"how's the pipeline and what about the ibkr mcp\" → two intents\n128\t- Keep related clauses together: \"are the pods running and healthy\" → Router - classifies utterances and routes to appropriate strands.\n\nUses LLM to classify intents by type and project, then routes:\n- task-profile intents → escalate strand (bead creation)\n- other intents → fetch + synthesize strands\n\"\"\"\nimport asyncio\nimport uuid\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom logging import getLogger\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\n\nfrom ..escalate.handler import EscalateRequest, escalate_intent\nfrom ..escalate.llm import get_zai_client, ModelClass\nfrom ..session.store import get_store\nfrom ..fetch.commands import FetchRequest, FetchContext, IntentType as FetchIntentType\nfrom ..fetch.orchestrator import execute_fetch\nfrom ..synthesize.strand import SynthesizeRequest, synthesize_intent\n\n\nlogger = getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass IntentType(Enum):\n    \"\"\"Intent types that the router can classify.\"\"\"\n    STATUS = \"status\"\n    ACTION = \"action\"\n    BRAINSTORM = \"brainstorm\"\n    LOOKUP = \"lookup\"\n    REMINDER = \"reminder\"\n    SELF_MODIFICATION = \"self-modification\"\n    MONITORING_CONFIG = \"monitoring-config\"\n    TASK_PROFILE = \"task-profile\"  # Escalate to NEEDLE bead\n    CLARIFICATION = \"clarification\"  # Needs user input\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass IntentClassification:\n    \"\"\"Result of intent classification.\"\"\"\n    intent_type: IntentType\n    project_slug: str | None = None\n    confidence: float = 1.0\n    utterance_fragment: str = \"\"\n    reasoning: str = \"\"\n    urgency: str = \"normal\"  # critical, high, normal, low\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass RoutedIntent:\n    \"\"\"A routed intent ready for processing.\"\"\"\n    intent_id: str\n    classification: IntentClassification\n    session_id: str\n    utterance: str\n\n\n# Router system prompt\nROUTER_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \"\"\"You are the Intent Router for aide-de-camp, a universal personal interface that routes user utterances to parallel agents across multiple projects and domains.\n\n## Your Role\n\nGiven a user utterance (stream-of-consciousness voice or text), you must:\n1. **Segment** the utterance into distinct intent threads\n2. **Classify** each thread by intent type\n3. **Route** each thread to the correct project\n4. **Assign** urgency tier\n\n## Output Format\n\nReturn a JSON array of intent objects:\n\n```json\n[\n  {\n    \"intent_type\": \"status|action|brainstorm|lookup|reminder|self-modification|monitoring-config|task-profile\",\n    \"project_slug\": \"project-id or null\",\n    \"urgency\": \"critical|high|normal|low\",\n    \"utterance_fragment\": \"the specific fragment this intent covers\",\n    \"confidence\": 0.0-1.0,\n    \"reasoning\": \"brief explanation of classification\"\n  }\n]\n```\n\n## Intent Types\n\n- **status**: Query current state (pods, pipelines, deployments, beads)\n- **action**: Execute a command (deploy, restart, create)\n- **brainstorm**: Explore options, design, architecture discussion\n- **lookup**: Find specific information (logs, configs, docs)\n- **reminder**: Set or query reminders\n- **self-modification**: Instructions to improve the interface itself\n- **monitoring-config**: Configure ambient monitoring rules\n- **task-profile**: Durable async work items that escalate to NEEDLE beads\n\n## Task-Profile Classification\n\nRoute to **task-profile** when:\n- User explicitly requests tracking (\"make me a bead for...\", \"track this as...\")\n- Intent requires multi-step implementation work\n- Request involves creating/modifying features or infrastructure\n- Complexity exceeds single-turn synthesis\n- Action verbs: \"implement\", \"add\", \"create\", \"fix\", \"investigate\", \"refactor\"\n- Scope indicators: \"feature\", \"bug\", \"optimization\", \"migration\"\n\nTask-profile intents are escalated to NEEDLE beads for durable async handling.\n\n## Urgency Tiers\n\n- **critical**: Blocking production, security incident, immediate action required\n- **high**: Important but not blocking, user is actively waiting\n- **normal**: Routine query, no time pressure\n- **low**: Background research, nice-to-have, can be deferred\n\n## Routing Logic\n\nUse available project context to map utterances to projects:\n- Look for direct project name matches\n- Check aliases (e.g., \"the pipeline\" → \"options-pipeline\")\n- Use context from previous utterances in the session\n- If ambiguous, set confidence < 0.7 and the system will clarify\n\n## Segmentation Guidelines\n\n- Split multi-part utterances: \"how's the pipeline and what about the ibkr mcp\" → two intents\n- Keep related clauses together: \"are the pods running and healthy\" → one intent\n- Extract compound workflows: \"deploy the pipeline and check if it synced\" → two intents (action, then status)\n\n## Confidence Threshold\n\n- **confidence >= 0.9**: Dispatch immediately\n- **confidence 0.7-0.9**: Dispatch but flag for possible clarification\n- **confidence < 0.7**: Return intent_type \"clarification\" with the ambiguous fragment\n\nReturn ONLY the JSON array. No explanations.\"\"\"\n\n\nclass IntentRouter:\n    \"\"\"\n    Intent Router classifies utterances and routes to appropriate strands.\n\n    For task-profile intents, routes to escalate strand for bead creation.\n    For other intents, routes to fetch + synthesize strands (TODO).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, store=None):\n        self.store = store\n        self._zai_client = None\n\n    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client.\"\"\"\n        if self._zai_client is None:\n            self._zai_client = get_zai_client()\n        return self._zai_client\n\n    async def _get_store(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create session store.\"\"\"\n        if self.store is None:\n            self.store = get_store()\n        return self.store\n\n    async def classify_utterance(\n        self,\n        utterance: str,\n        session_id: str,\n    ) -> list[IntentClassification]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Classify an utterance into intents.\n\n        Uses LLM to segment and classify the utterance.\n\n        Args:\n            utterance: The user utterance\n            session_id: Session ID for context\n\n        Returns:\n            List of IntentClassification objects\n        \"\"\"\n        client = await self._get_zai_client()\n\n        # Build user message with session context if available\n        store = await self._get_store()\n        session_context = \"\"\n        try:\n            session = await store.get_session(session_id)\n            if session:\n                # Get recent intents for context\n                recent_intents = await store.get_recent_intents(session_id, limit=5)\n                if recent_intents:\n                    session_context = \"\\n\\nRecent intents in this session:\\n\"\n                    for intent in recent_intents:\n                        session_context += f\"- {intent.get('utterance', '')} ({intent.get('intent_type', 'unknown')})\\n\"\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to get session context: {e}\")\n\n        user_message = f\"Classify this utterance:\\n\\n{utterance}{session_context}\"\n\n        logger.info(f\"Classifying utterance for session {session_id}\")\n\n        try:\n            response = await client.call_simple(\n                system_prompt=ROUTER_SYSTEM_PROMPT,\n                user_message=user_message,\n                model=ModelClass.SONNET.value,\n                max_tokens=2048,\n                temperature=0.3,  # Lower temperature for consistent classification\n            )\n\n            # Parse JSON response\n            import json\n\n            intents_data = json.loads(response)\n            classifications = []\n\n            for intent_data in intents_data:\n                # Map string to IntentType enum\n                intent_type_str = intent_data.get(\"intent_type\", \"status\")\n                try:\n                    intent_type = IntentType(intent_type_str)\n                except ValueError:\n                    logger.warning(f\"Unknown intent type: {intent_type_str}\")\n                    intent_type = IntentType.STATUS\n\n                classification = IntentClassification(\n                    intent_type=intent_type,\n                    project_slug=intent_data.get(\"project_slug\"),\n                    confidence=float(intent_data.get(\"confidence\", 0.8)),\n                    utterance_fragment=intent_data.get(\"utterance_fragment\", utterance),\n                    reasoning=intent_data.get(\"reasoning\", \"\"),\n                    urgency=intent_data.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n                )\n                classifications.append(classification)\n\n            logger.info(f\"Classified {len(classifications)} intents from utterance\")\n            return classifications\n\n        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to parse router response as JSON: {e}\")\n            # Fallback: return single status intent\n            return [\n                IntentClassification(\n                    intent_type=IntentType.STATUS,\n                    utterance_fragment=utterance,\n                    confidence=0.5,\n                    reasoning=\"Classification failed, defaulting to status\",\n                )\n            ]\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Classification failed: {e}\")\n            raise\n\n    async def route_utterance(\n        self,\n        utterance: str,\n        utterance_id: str,\n        session_id: str,\n    ) -> list[RoutedIntent]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Route an utterance to appropriate strands.\n\n        Classifies the utterance and routes each intent to the correct strand.\n\n        Args:\n            utterance: The user utterance\n            utterance_id: Unique ID for this utterance\n            session_id: Session ID\n\n        Returns:\n            List of RoutedIntent objects\n        \"\"\"\n        # Classify the utterance\n        classifications = await self.classify_utterance(utterance, session_id)\n\n        routed_intents = []\n        for classification in classifications:\n            # Create intent ID\n            intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n            routed_intent = RoutedIntent(\n                intent_id=intent_id,\n                classification=classification,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                utterance=classification.utterance_fragment,\n            )\n            routed_intents.append(routed_intent)\n\n        return routed_intents\n\n    async def process_intent(\n        self,\n        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Process a routed intent by dispatching to the appropriate strand.\n\n        Args:\n            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n\n        Returns:\n            Result dictionary with status and data\n        \"\"\"\n        classification = routed_intent.classification\n\n        # For task-profile intents, escalate to bead\n        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.TASK_PROFILE:\n            return await self._escalate_to_bead(routed_intent)\n\n        # For other intents, fetch then synthesize\n        return await self._fetch_and_synthesize(routed_intent)\n\n    async def _fetch_and_synthesize(\n        self,\n        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Fetch context then synthesize into structured result.\n\n        Args:\n            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n\n        Returns:\n            Result dictionary with synthesized data\n        \"\"\"\n        classification = routed_intent.classification\n\n        logger.info(\n            f\"Fetching and synthesizing intent {routed_intent.intent_id} \"\n            f\"(type: {classification.intent_type.value})\"\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Step 1: Fetch context\n            fetch_intent_type = self._map_intent_type(classification.intent_type)\n            fetch_request = FetchRequest(\n                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n                context=FetchContext(\n                    project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n                ),\n            )\n\n            fetch_result = await execute_fetch(fetch_request)\n\n            # Step 2: Synthesize result\n            synthesize_request = SynthesizeRequest(\n                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n                fetched_context=fetch_result,\n                urgency=classification.urgency,\n            )\n\n            synthesize_result = await synthesize_intent(synthesize_request)\n\n            return {\n                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                \"status\": \"resolved\",\n                \"data\": synthesize_result.data,\n                \"summary\": synthesize_result.summary,\n                \"urgency\": synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n                \"coverage\": synthesize_result.coverage,\n                \"caveats\": synthesize_result.caveats,\n                \"message\": f\"Intent synthesized successfully\",\n            }\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Fetch/synthesize failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {e}\")\n            return {\n                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                \"status\": \"error\",\n                \"error\": str(e),\n                \"message\": \"Failed to fetch or synthesize intent\",\n            }\n\n    def _map_intent_type(self, intent_type: IntentType) -> FetchIntentType:\n        \"\"\"Map router IntentType to fetch IntentType.\"\"\"\n        # Map enum values by string\n        type_map = {\n            IntentType.STATUS: FetchIntentType.STATUS,\n            IntentType.ACTION: FetchIntentType.ACTION,\n            IntentType.BRAINSTORM: FetchIntentType.BRAINSTORM,\n            IntentType.LOOKUP: FetchIntentType.LOOKUP,\n            IntentType.REMINDER: FetchIntentType.REMINDER,\n            IntentType.SELF_MODIFICATION: FetchIntentType.SELF_MODIFICATION,\n            IntentType.MONITORING_CONFIG: FetchIntentType.MONITORING_CONFIG,\n        }\n        return type_map.get(intent_type, FetchIntentType.STATUS)\n\n    async def _escalate_to_bead(\n        self,\n        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Escalate a task-profile intent to a NEEDLE bead.\n\n        Args:\n            routed_intent: The routed intent to escalate\n\n        Returns:\n            Result dictionary with pending card\n        \"\"\"\n        classification = routed_intent.classification\n\n        # Build escalate request\n        escalate_request = EscalateRequest(\n            intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n            session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n            utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n            intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n            project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n            context={\n                \"reasoning\": classification.reasoning,\n                \"urgency\": classification.urgency,\n            },\n            metadata={\n                \"urgency\": classification.urgency,\n                \"confidence\": classification.confidence,\n            },\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Escalate to bead\n            result = await escalate_intent(escalate_request)\n\n            return {\n                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                \"status\": \"escalated\",\n                \"bead_id\": result.bead_id,\n                \"pending_card\": result.pending_card,\n                \"message\": f\"Escalated to bead {result.bead_id}\",\n            }\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Escalation failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {e}\")\n            return {\n                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                \"status\": \"error\",\n                \"error\": str(e),\n                \"message\": \"Failed to escalate to bead\",\n            }\n\n\n# Global router instance\n_router: Optional[IntentRouter] = None\n\n\ndef get_router(store=None) -> IntentRouter:\n    \"\"\"Get or create the global intent router instance.\"\"\"\n    global _router\n    if _router is None:\n        _router = IntentRouter(store=store)\n    return _router\n","numLines":461,"startLine":1,"totalLines":461}}}
